title: taraxacum dentatum
intro: Taraxacum dentatum, also known as the toothed dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of Taraxacum dentatum include reducing blood pressure, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting liver health. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
